name: lionagi
description: lionagi Claude Code plugins — agent orchestration, playbook authoring, and development workflows

plugins.name: show
plugins.description: Orchestrate multi-play workflows: decompose a goal into li-play invocations, gate each output, and adapt the plan based on results.

plugins.name: play
plugins.description: Author lionagi playbooks — the YAML files that li play and li o flow use to define and invoke reusable agent workflows.

plugins.name: orchestrate
plugins.description: Multi-agent DAG orchestration via li o flow and li o fanout: write flow specs, validate them, fire parallel agents, and monitor execution.

plugins.name: devx
plugins.description: Development workflow skills: conventional commits, formatting, CI checks, PR creation, and session summaries.

_deferred_plugins: kg-bridge — bridge between lionagi runs and a knowledge graph; requires implementation
studio — Studio MCP server access; deferred until li studio MCP server ships
mcp-bundle — canonical MCP server bundle; deferred until agent MCP skills land
memory — MEMORY.md hygiene + cross-session recall; deferred to v2.1 pending lionagi-native rewrite against ~/.lionagi/runs/
